programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The Titan Games' premieres with an action-packed two-hour episode. Host and Executive Producer Dwayne Johnson reveals the competition’s new format with regional brackets and the addition of Professional Athlete Titans representing each region. In this episode, competitors from the Central division will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Female competitors will have to face two-time Olympic gold-medal winning and current undisputed boxing world champion Claressa Shields, while the males will take on NFL Iron Man Legend and 10x Pro-Bowler Joe Thomas. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn’t be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with Grug and Eep’s traditions, Grug has second thoughts. It isn’t until Sandy goes missing that Grug realizes it’s time to start a new tradition.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil humiliates himself playing throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys, the Croods band together to help him regain his confidence. Unfortunately, Phil goes from confident to cocky and bets the farm on a game of throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys. Can the Croods overcome the punch monkeys - and Phil - to save the farm?

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Gran announces it’s time to choose a new Thunder Sisters Queen, Ugga assumes she’s got it in the bag. But after a series of challenges (the Thunder Games), it becomes clear Gran might not be ready to step down.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Mega Fat is fired from Baby Corp;he’s forced on the path of recovery towards being a Good Baby. However;Mega Fat is more interested in getting revenge on Boss Baby than finding the perfect family to adopt him.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby uses the cover of Halloween Night to sneak into Bubeezee’s Headquarters to shut it all down. Tim covers for Boss by distracting Marisol with a night of trick or treating.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: A brainwashed Boss Baby breaks free from overly sanitized Bubbeezee products. He rallies the Playgroup Babies to run the company out of business by breaking every product in town.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom has to keep his mom, Olivia, distracted while Jun, Alex, and D’Angelo use a new dragon to close off a cave leading to the Crystal Realm, and prevent her from discovering the dragons.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When Feather is taken by a group of what appear to be zombie dragons, Alex finds her inner hero and rescues her friend.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Thunder train a new species of aggressive tidal dragons to help the other riders put out a forest fire threatening ICARIS.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Unable to decide how to prove their innocence, the team has a huge fight! Ms. Nowhere and Echo Pearl reach out to Palindrome with the evidence they've collected while Tony and Cisco find Uncle Tuco at a lucha libra match, where Cisco must face the ultimate question: can you always trust family?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: When the team learns of several robberies in Mexico City that resemble the attack on the agency. Ms. Nowhere puts the pieces together and realizes who set them up: an ex-operative she used to work with named Moray. Now, she and the crew must infiltrate a masquerade ball to come face to face with Moray and figure out what he's up to.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Moray attacks the hauler with an EMP sending it into emergency lockdown and trapping the team inside. Now, it’s up to Roscoe, the only one small enough to fit through a vent, to find help. Meanwhile, Palindrome hunts down Moray using the evidence gathered by Ms. Nowhere.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim is imprisoned in the Darklands, Blinky tries to decipher the Amulet to save him while Claire, Toby, and NotEnrique race to recover the Killahead Bridge before it's too late

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Coran reveals the origin story of Voltron and the original paladins

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Grug won't let her join his winning team, Eep forms her own underdog team in the first-ever sports competition – Ahhh! Valley's annual Egg Toss.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Thunk is so stinky he kills animals with his stench, he pretends to be a great hunter; A spider ant bite gives Grug the biggest brain in town.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Abigail puts herself at risk to reunite an orphaned otter with his family. But the school veterinarian insists the animal will be safer at the zoo.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky and Bebe spend the weekend pretending to be besties when their fathers come for a family visit and reveal that they're old friends.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Revvit and the Reptools are trapped by Scraptors and create a fake T-Truxto scare them away, only to then have Skrap-It attempt to steal it

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Revenge of the Creature Catcher Casper, Mantha and Ra accidentally lead Jimmy's father to the underworld.Slugby. To prove that the teachers haven't gone soft, Alder and Dash stage a Slugby match.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: You Oughta Be in Pictures When Mantha sees a Deedstown mob attacking a group of fellow zombies, she's determined to lead them in a counterattack. Crypt Critters Mantha comes down with an embarrassing case of crypt critters, but refuses to go to the nurse.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: An old Pirate tells Rupert he is searching for the treasure that will raise his sunken ship from the depths. How can Rupert help him?

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Ping Pong's glow-worm trick goes wrong, it's her rival Bill who ends up helping out… with spectacular results.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene’s debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn’t ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab’s introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders journey to Glacier Island in search of the Snow Wraith, a fearsome dragon that holds key to the Dragon Eye's mysteries.

programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world.
